steps.title: Match the narrative frame
steps.content: The sentence recounts past events after Rahman devised a technique in 1987. It later says he "would become known" as the father of femtochemistry, so the blank should use the same past-future construction for a later consequence.

steps.title: Keep the tense parallel
steps.content: A uses present tense, C uses future tense, and D uses past perfect without a supported earlier reference point. The parallel construction describes what later happened from the past narrative viewpoint. The answer is B.
